title: Design System: Claread Web Functional UI

reading.purpose: English article body, example sentences, and Reader excerpts.

body.purpose: Chinese explanations, controls, panels, and utility surfaces.

display.purpose: Share/export covers and rare brand moments.

shadows.name: surface-quiet
shadows.purpose: Ordinary note cards, history rows, paste entry surfaces.

shadows.name: reader-float
shadows.purpose: Dictionary popovers, grammar notes, selection toolbar.

components.name: Editorial Reader
components.description: Default Web Reader: single-column article with progressive annotations.
components.html:
The world's largest ever digital camera has become operational

has become operational in an observatory in Chile.
components.css: .ds-web-reader { max-width: 780px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 64px 48px; background: #FAF9F6; color: #111111; } .ds-web-reader h1 { margin: 0 0 36px; font: 650 42px/1.18 Source Serif Pro, Georgia, serif; } .ds-web-reader p { margin: 0; font: 400 20px/1.9 Source Serif Pro, Georgia, serif; } .ds-web-reader mark { background: rgba(228,176,0,0.24); color: inherit; padding: 0 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Light Marginalia Note
components.description: Quiet right-rail or floating note tied to the current sentence.
components.html:
新闻导语式主谓宾结构

句子主干是 The camera has become operational，地点状语补充背景。
components.css: .ds-web-note { width: 300px; padding: 18px 20px; border-radius: 16px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #111111; border: 1px solid rgba(17,17,17,0.06); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(17,17,17,0.03), 0 8px 24px rgba(17,17,17,0.04); } .ds-web-note strong { display: block; margin-bottom: 10px; font: 650 15px/1.35 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, PingFang SC, sans-serif; } .ds-web-note p { margin: 0; color: #4A4A4A; font: 400 14px/1.65 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, PingFang SC, sans-serif; }

components.name: Grammar X-Ray Label
components.description: Focused syntax label for Web's signature grammar visualization mode.
components.css: .ds-xray-label { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 26px; padding: 0 9px; border-radius: 8px; background: #155CFF; color: #FFFFFF; font: 700 12px/1 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(21,92,255,0.18); }

components.name: Artifact Preview Card
components.description: Premium share/export preview for long image, PDF, or Markdown output.
components.html:
Grammar X-Ray Notes

Long Sentence Breakdown

结构、语法和译文被整理成可保存的精读笔记。
components.css: .ds-artifact-card { width: 380px; padding: 34px; border-radius: 28px; background: #FBFAF6; color: #111111; border: 1px solid #E8E4DA; box-shadow: 0 28px 90px rgba(17,17,17,0.16); } .ds-artifact-card small { display: block; margin-bottom: 18px; color: #155CFF; font: 700 11px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-artifact-card h2 { margin: 0 0 16px; font: 650 31px/1.14 Source Serif Pro, Georgia, serif; } .ds-artifact-card p { margin: 0; color: #4A4A4A; font: 400 15px/1.7 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, PingFang SC, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: Claread Web 是一个功能优先的高保真阅读空间。它不靠 landing 建立第一印象，而靠粘贴即解读、文章解析页、历史/生词/复习这些日常功能，以及后续分享和导出产物来建立品牌记忆。
keyCharacteristics: Functional pages first, but with premium craft.
Single-column reader by default, progressive marginalia when needed.
Grammar X-Ray as the memorable Web-native capability.
Artifact Studio as a second-stage export/share surface.

rules.name: The Reader Paper Rule
rules.body: 文章所在区域必须有明确阅读面。不要让文章漂在普通后台灰底上。

rules.name: The Reader Weight Rule
rules.body: 正文不能被控件字体压过。控件可以清晰，但不应比文章更有存在感。

rules.name: The Shell Recedes Rule
rules.body: 应用壳永远比 Reader 轻。侧栏、顶栏、历史面板不能抢正文。

dos: Do 先做 /app、Reader、history、vocabulary、review、profile、share 等功能页。
Do 让 Reader 成为 Web 端的品牌第一现场。
Do 默认单栏阅读，让轻旁注渐进出现。
donts: Don't 先投入完整 landing 和产品介绍页。
Don't 使用传统 SaaS dashboard 作为 Web 默认形态。
Don't 把右侧栏做成 AI chat。
